form.formComment: Bounced back last start after failing to finish two starts back when she finished 3rd over 515m at this track beaten 5.5 lengths (30.18) behind Drink To That in a Grade 5 on April 4. Looks a strong winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Bounced back last start after failing to finish two starts back when she finished 3rd over 515m at this track beaten 5.5 lengths (30.18) behind Drink To That in a Grade 5 on April 4. Looks a strong winning hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened and severely checked through the 1st turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Strongly fancied last time and hit the ground running with a fast early split, paving the way for a 9 length win at Taree Super Track over 525m in 30.64. In form and is right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strongly fancied last time and hit the ground running with a fast early split, paving the way for a 9 length win at Taree Super Track over 525m in 30.64. In form and is right in the mix again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted wide across heels rounding the turn out of the front straight.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 6 over 400m at Maitland in a Grade 5. Happy enough to avoid.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 6 over 400m at Maitland in a Grade 5. Happy enough to avoid.

form.formComment: Strong performance racing just off the speed and going on to score by 2 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording a solid 22.87 over the 400m journey. Smart win and looks a key chance again here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance racing just off the speed and going on to score by 2 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording a solid 22.87 over the 400m journey. Smart win and looks a key chance again here.

form.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 3rd on April 1 over 525m at Taree Super Track behind Zipping Vivid beaten 7 lengths (30.75) in a NG. Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 3rd on April 1 over 525m at Taree Super Track behind Zipping Vivid beaten 7 lengths (30.75) in a NG. Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 400m at this track. Others preferred on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 400m at this track. Others preferred on this occasion.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (25.64) at Maitland in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed four times. Looks well placed and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (25.64) at Maitland in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed four times. Looks well placed and should feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the home straight.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fifth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Expected to feature on best form.
